headline: Iran attacks in Strait of Hormuz are 'economic terrorism against every nation,' UAE oil CEO says
summary: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must reopen to resolve the supply shock.

raw.headline: Iran attacks in Strait of Hormuz are 'economic terrorism against every nation,' UAE oil CEO says
raw.summary: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must reopen to resolve the supply shock.

headline: EchoStar Stock Is Now in the S&P 500. Elon Musk’s SpaceX Gave it a Boost.
summary: Telecom EchoStar holds about $11 billion worth of stock in Musk’s SpaceX, acquired when it sold wireless spectrum to the rocket company.

raw.headline: EchoStar Stock Is Now in the S&P 500. Elon Musk’s SpaceX Gave it a Boost.
raw.summary: Telecom EchoStar holds about $11 billion worth of stock in Musk’s SpaceX, acquired when it sold wireless spectrum to the rocket company.

headline: Market's winners & losers last week: Why these 2 sectors stand out
summary: Barron's Investor Circle newsletter editor Josh Schafer sits down with Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland to go over the top winners and losers in the markets (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) last week, highlighting two sectors in particular.

headline: Chevron CEO says Iran war impact isn't fully priced into oil market, traders have ‘scant information’
summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth said the physical supply of oil is much tighter than the oil futures market suggests.

raw.headline: Chevron CEO says Iran war impact isn't fully priced into oil market, traders have ‘scant information’
raw.summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth said the physical supply of oil is much tighter than the oil futures market suggests.

headline: Trump administration plans to bring more diesel to market as fuel prices surge, Wright says
summary: Diesel prices have surged about 40% to $5.29 per gallon, the highest level since 2022, as the U.S. war against Iran has disrupted oil supplies.

raw.headline: Trump administration plans to bring more diesel to market as fuel prices surge, Wright says
raw.summary: Diesel prices have surged about 40% to $5.29 per gallon, the highest level since 2022, as the U.S. war against Iran has disrupted oil supplies.

headline: Watch Energy Secretary Wright discuss Iran war after Trump postpones power plant strikes
summary: Wright's comments Monday come after Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants if the Islamic Republic's leaders do not fully open the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: Watch Energy Secretary Wright discuss Iran war after Trump postpones power plant strikes
raw.summary: Wright's comments Monday come after Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants if the Islamic Republic's leaders do not fully open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: 10-year Treasury yield falls after Trump halts strikes against Iran
summary: Yields fell sharply, reversing course after Trump said further military strikes against Iran had been postponed.

raw.headline: 10-year Treasury yield falls after Trump halts strikes against Iran
raw.summary: Yields fell sharply, reversing course after Trump said further military strikes against Iran had been postponed.
